abort.login_failed: Alexa Media Player failed to login.
abort.reauth_successful: Alexa Media Player successfully reauthenticated. Please ignore the "Aborted" message from HA.
abort.wrong_account: The Amazon account you logged in with does not match this entry. Log in with the same account you originally enrolled.
abort.already_configured: This Amazon account is already configured.

error.invalid_domain: Unsupported Amazon region domain. Use a domain like amazon.com, amazon.co.uk, or amazon.de.
error.paste_required: Paste the full redirect URL from your browser.
error.paste_invalid: That URL is not a valid Amazon maplanding redirect for this region.
error.register_failed: Device registration failed (the code may have expired). Restart the login and paste the URL within ~5 minutes.
error.try_again: Could not reach Amazon to verify the new login. Check your connection and try again.

data.exclude_devices: or Exclude these devices from all (comma separated)
data.extended_entity_discovery: Include additional sensors, switches and lights
data.queue_delay: Delay to queue multiple commands together (seconds)

data_description.debug:
Enables very verbose, trace-level logging for advanced troubleshooting.
Not recommended for normal operation due to increased log volume.
Ensure logger levels are set to DEBUG for full output.
data_description.email: Only used as a label and to confirm the region — your password is never entered here.

user.description: Enter your Amazon account email and region. You will log in on Amazon's own page in the next step; no password or Authenticator key is entered in Home Assistant.
user.title: Alexa Media Player - Account

paste.description:
1. Open this URL in your browser and log in to Amazon:

{url}

2. After login you land on a blank/error page at /ap/maplanding — that is expected.
3. Copy the FULL address-bar URL and paste it below (it expires in ~5 minutes).
paste.title: Alexa Media Player - Complete Login ({email})

deprecated_yaml_configuration.description:
YAML configuration of Alexa Media Player is deprecated.
Please remove `alexa_media` from your configuration, restart Home Assistant and use the UI to configure it instead.
Settings > Devices & services > Integrations > ADD INTEGRATION
deprecated_yaml_configuration.title: YAML configuration is deprecated

data.exclude_devices: or Exclude these devices from all (comma separated)
data.extended_entity_discovery: Include additional sensors, switches and lights
data.public_url: Public URL shared with external hosted services
data.queue_delay: Delay to queue multiple commands together (seconds)

data_description.debug:
Enables very verbose, trace-level logging for advanced troubleshooting.
Not recommended for normal operation due to increased log volume.
Ensure logger levels are set to DEBUG for full output.
data_description.otp_secret: Example: 35T5 LQSY I5IO 3EFQ LGAJ I6YB JWBY JJPR PYT7 XPPW IDAK SQBJ CVXA

enable_network_discovery.description: Re-enables Alexa network discovery so the next polling cycle will rediscover Alexa devices for the selected accounts.

email.description: Optional Alexa account email or list of emails. If empty, all known accounts will be refreshed.
email.name: Email address

enable_network_discovery.name: Enable Network Discovery

force_logout.description: Force account to logout. Used mainly for debugging.

email.description: Accounts to clear. Empty will clear all.
email.name: Email address

force_logout.name: Force Logout

get_history_records.description: Parses the history records for the specified device

entity_id.description: Entity to get the history for
entity_id.name: Select media player:

get_history_records.name: Get History Records

restore_volume.description: Restore previous volume level on Alexa media player device

entity_id.description: Entity to restore the previous volume level on
entity_id.name: Select media player:

restore_volume.name: Restore Previous Volume

update_last_called.description: Forces update of last_called echo device for each Alexa account.

email.description: List of Alexa accounts to update. If empty, will update all known accounts.
email.name: Email address

update_last_called.name: Update Last Called Sensor
